back_translation: My beloved children, I am writing these things to you so that you will not commit sin. And if anyone commits sin, we have a Helper who is in the presence of the Father — Jesus Christ the Righteous One
And He Himself is the atoning sacrifice of our sins, and not only ours, but also the atoning sacrifice of all the world
And by this thing, we can know that we know Him: if we keep His commandments
The one who says, ‘I know Him,’ but does not keep His commandments, that one is a liar, and the truth is not in him
But whoever keeps His word, the love of God has truly been completed in that one. By this thing, we know that we are in Him
The one who claims to abide in Him must conduct his life just as He has conducted Himself
Beloved, I am not writing a new commandment to you, but it is the old commandment that you have had from the beginning. This old commandment is the message you have already heard
Furthermore, I am also writing a new commandment to you, which is true both in Him and in you all, because the darkness is fading away, and the true light is already shining
The one who says he is in the light but hates his brother, that one is still in the darkness up to now
The one who loves his brother is in the light, and there is no cause-of-stumbling in him
But the one who hates his brother is in the darkness, and walks in the darkness, and he does not know where he is going, because the darkness has made his eyes blind
Beloved children all, I am writing to you, because your sins have been forgiven by His name
Fathers, I am writing to you, because you know Him who has existed from the beginning. Young men, I am writing to you, because you have overcome the evil one

Children all, I have written to you, because you know the Father. Fathers, I have written to you, because you know Him who has existed from the beginning. Young men, I have written to you, because you are strong, and the word of God abides in you, and you have overcome the evil one
Do not love the world, or anything in the world. If anyone loves the world, the love of the Father is not in that person
Because everything that is in the world, namely the lust of the flesh, the lust of the eyes, and the pride in life, does not come from the Father, but comes from the world
And the world together with its lusts is fading away, but the one who does the will of God will abide forever

Children all, this time is the last hour, and just as you have heard that the antichrist is about to come, and now there are many antichrists who have already arisen. By this reason, we know that this time is the last hour

They have gone out from among us, but they were never of us. For if they were of us, they would have remained with us still. But the fact that they went out makes it clearly apparent that none of them was of us at all
But you all, you have received an anointing from the Holy One, and all of you know
I have not written to you because you do not know the truth, but because you know that truth, and because no lying word comes from the truth
Who, then, is the liar, if not the one who denies that Jesus is the Christ? That very one is the antichrist, namely the one who denies both the Father and the Son
Everyone who denies the Son also does not have the Father. The one who confesses the Son also has the Father
But you all, let what you have heard from the beginning abide in you. If what you have heard from the beginning abides in you, you also will abide in the Son and in the Father
And this is the promise that He Himself has promised to us, namely eternal life
I have written these things to you about those who are trying to deceive you

But you all, the anointing that you received from Him, abides in you, and you have no need that anyone teach you. But just as the anointing of His teaches you in all things, that anointing is true and is not a lie. And just as He has taught you, you also abide in Him
And now, beloved children all, abide in Him, so that when He reveals Himself, we will have boldness, and will not be ashamed before Him at His coming
If you know that He is righteous, you also know that everyone who practices righteousness has been born from Him
